name: developer
description: SDLC S4 (Build) + S6 (Release Prep). Code gen theo design, unit tests ≥80%, self-review, release checklist. Trigger: /s4, /s6

resources.name: SteeringDocs
resources.description: Project conventions (CRITICAL). Search: "naming convention", "Response Format", "Database", "test coverage", "Vitest", "commit convention", "security enforcement", "commit policy".

resources.name: AIRules
resources.description: Backend coding rules for NestJS + Prisma + DDD (5 files). Search: "use case rules", "aggregate rules", "port rules", "error handling", "concurrency", "Prisma", "Zod", "input validation", "sonar policy", "sonar rules", "code smell", "cognitive complexity", "AI behavior".

resources.name: ParityRules
resources.description: MANDATORY pre-commit check for any code touching response format, error codes, voucher state, cache TTLs, brute-force config, or HTTP status. 15 bug-for-bug preservation rules — IDE will want to "fix" 3 (typos vảo/Gía), 4 (VI=EN identical), 5 (empty messages), 6 (GI_PIN_INVALID_LENGTH name), 13 (FAILED_ATTEMPS typo). Hold the line. Each rule is a non-negotiable.

resources.name: Glossary
resources.description: Term definitions only. Search ONLY when encountering an unfamiliar term: PSR-4 hijack, bridge worker, Compound prefix, CONTRACT vs ACCIDENT, biz.configure, Port/Adapter, Command vs Query, Bounded Context.

resources.name: Dev-Onboarding
resources.description: Dev path: layered architecture, 7 bounded contexts, parity traps, first-endpoint walkthrough for /v6.0/checkmultiple, IDE warnings to silence, 16-file deep reading list.

resources.name: PhpContract-Impl
resources.description: IMPLEMENT-AGAINST: verbatim values for code. 8 files. Search: 58 error codes verbatim (01), field-order per endpoint (02), state enum + state=11 virtual + state=10 magic (03), code regex GI prefix passthrough (04), Cache::put TTL seconds-not-minutes + Compound prefix (05), HTTP 200 always (06), thresholds + biz.configure keys + brute-force typo (07), vendor functions to rewrite by hand (08).

resources.name: Architecture
resources.description: Implementation rules — PR gate checklists. 9 files. Search: dependency direction ESLint (03), port interfaces (04), execution step-by-step per use case (05), transaction boundaries + lock model (06), error→return_code mapping table (07 — large 31K), 11 anti-patterns to reject in PR (08), 38 hard implementation constraints (09). MUST consult 03+08+09 before opening PR.

resources.name: Mapping-Impl
resources.description: PHP→Node translation. 7 files. Search: PHP method → Node file mapping (01), vendor package per-package strategy (02), Prisma queries + cross-DB biz.* fully-qualified SQL (03), undici HTTP adapters with retry+timeout (04), Redis bridge worker push format (05), prom-client labels matching PHP metrics (06), local infra topology + env vars (07).

resources.name: BusinessRules
resources.description: Use case orchestration + 7 conditional rules + redemption calculator details. Consult only when implementing a use case or rule logic — not for general parity.

resources.name: OpenAPI
resources.description: Endpoint schemas. Generate Zod schemas / DTOs / @ApiResponse decorators from this.

resources.name: LocalDev
resources.description: Local dev environment setup (docker-compose, MySQL, Redis). Use only when scaffolding new test runner or fixing dev setup.

resources.name: EnvVars
resources.description: Env var reference with verified PHP defaults. Consult when adding/changing config or writing ConfigService.

resources.name: SpecsHistory
resources.description: Existing feature specs. Search for existing code patterns, design decisions from previous features.

stop.command:
SPEC=$(python3 -c "import json;print(json.load(open('specs/.active-feature.json')).get('active_spec',''))" 2>/dev/null)
if [ -n "$SPEC" ] && [ -f "${SPEC}/tasks.md" ]; then
  TOTAL=$(grep -c '^\- \[' "${SPEC}/tasks.md" 2>/dev/null || echo 0)
  DONE=$(grep -c '^\- \[x\]' "${SPEC}/tasks.md" 2>/dev/null || echo 0)
  echo ""
  echo "=== Tasks: ${DONE}/${TOTAL} ==="
  NEXT=$(grep -m1 '^\- \[ \]' "${SPEC}/tasks.md" 2>/dev/null | head -1)
  [ -n "$NEXT" ] && echo "Next: ${NEXT}"
  echo ""
  echo "=== Uncommitted ==="
  git diff --stat specs/ src/ apps/ 2>/dev/null | tail -3 || true
fi

userPromptSubmit.command:
python3 -c "
import json,sys,re
d=json.load(sys.stdin)
msg=d.get('user_message','')
m=re.search(r'\b(\d{4,6})\b',msg)
if m: print(f'[Auto-context] ticket_id detected: {m.group(1)}')
" 2>/dev/null||true

welcomeMessage: Developer sẵn sàng. Dùng /s4 {ticket_id} {feature-slug} để bắt đầu build.
